title: The Creator Is Fake. The Glow Is Real.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~22s. Featured brand: Glow Recipe. Inspired by Tim Koda (DUFOo8hjPq4). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry UGC reel for Glow Recipe. The hook: the creator talking to camera is not a real person, she is generated in Masonry, and so is every step of the testimonial. It walks the seven-step UGC workflow as Masonry features: face realism, product in hand, outfit change, environment change, emotion control, natural movement, and the imperfections that make it indistinguishable from reality. Zero actors, zero shoot, unlimited on-brand UGC. Closes on the DROP comment CTA.
audio: Upbeat UGC pop track. Talking-creator VO drives it (testimonial style); keyword supers punch the workflow steps. Cut to the beat.

beats.vo: Hey, quick one: none of this is a real person.
beats.super: Big handwritten 'hey', top-left, bounces in then settles.
beats.visual: Creator greets camera, casual lifestyle bathroom setting, selfie distance, warm and natural.
beats.masonry: Generate the UGC creator in Masonry: prompt 'casual lifestyle UGC, woman talking to camera, soft bathroom daylight, 9:16.' This is your fully generated brand spokesperson.
beats.edit: Selfie framing, slight handheld bob, talking-head energy.
beats.sfx: Upbeat UGC pop track starts; a light vocal-chop hook.

beats.vo: I built her face in Masonry. Real skin, real pores.
beats.super: 'add the face' lower-third, mono UI font; a small Masonry panel sits in frame.
beats.visual: Tight on the creator's face: freckles, skin texture, natural imperfections. A Masonry UI panel overlays at the corner.
beats.masonry: Step 1, face realism: in Masonry prompt 'photoreal skin, visible pores, freckles, natural imperfections.' This realism layer makes the generated creator read as human.
beats.edit: Push-in to the skin macro, then back to the face. Quick UI zoom.
beats.sfx: UI click as the panel opens.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2-3: 'add to my' with the workflow UI panel.

beats.vo: Now drop the product right into her hand.
beats.super: 'add to my hand' centered, snaps in on the product reveal.
beats.visual: Creator, excited, holds up a Glow Recipe Plum Plump Hyaluronic tube to camera, candy-pink packaging catching the light.
beats.masonry: Step 2, product integration: drop Glow Recipe's Plum Plump tube into Masonry and prompt 'creator holding this product, natural grip, soft studio light.' Seamless placement, real hand interaction.
beats.edit: Snap-zoom onto the product as it lands in frame.
beats.sfx: Bright pop on the product reveal.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4-5: 'add / hand.' holding the product tube.

beats.super: Step tag '3. outfit change' mono UI font; a Masonry outfit panel shows options.
beats.visual: The creator now in a different on-brand outfit, Masonry UI showing outfit variants beside her.
beats.masonry: Step 3, outfit change: in Masonry hit Restyle and prompt the new outfit. Same face, same product, instantly restyled to the Glow Recipe brand palette.
beats.edit: Match-cut on the outfit swap so she stays locked, only the clothes change.
beats.sfx: Swoosh on the swap; UI tick.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6-7: '3 outfit change' with the wardrobe UI.

beats.vo: Drop her into any environment you want.
beats.super: Step tag '4. environment change' mono; 'every environment possible' builds across the cuts.
beats.visual: The creator now in an upscale restaurant, then another set, same person and product, fully relocated. Masonry environment panel visible.
beats.masonry: Step 4, environment generation: prompt 'same creator, restaurant interior, perfect lighting adaptation,' then swap to any backdrop. Masonry relights her to match each set.
beats.edit: Two location cuts, slight push-in each. Keep her scale and eyeline consistent.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8-10: '4 environment change / every / possible'.

beats.vo: Pick any emotion. Excited, calm, conversational.
beats.super: Step tag '5. add emotion' mono; 'emotion.' punches in.
beats.visual: Creator cycles expressions: bright smile, then soft sincere. Masonry emotion control panel beside her.
beats.masonry: Step 5, emotion control: prompt the delivery, 'excited testimonial' or 'calm conversational.' Masonry drives the performance so the UGC matches the brief.
beats.sfx: Two light ticks on each expression.

beats.super: 'makes you' lower-third; a Masonry video tile renders in the panel.
beats.visual: A Masonry video tile of the creator gesturing naturally, hands moving as she talks.
beats.masonry: Step 6, natural movement: generate the talking clip in Masonry, 'natural gestures, human cadence.' This is the motion pass that sells it as live UGC.
beats.edit: Cut to the rendered video tile, slight scale-up.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 13-14: 'makes / you' with the video render UI.

beats.vo: The secret? The tiny imperfections. Indistinguishable from reality.
beats.super: Words build across cuts; 'indistinguishable' and 'reality.' land bold, centered.
beats.visual: Back to the creator, confident, then an extreme macro of skin and eyes, flawlessly real.
beats.masonry: Step 7, the imperfections: in Masonry keep the micro-detail (stray hairs, soft skin shine, slight asymmetry). That realism layer makes the Glow Recipe UGC undetectable.
beats.edit: Cut from medium to extreme face macro; very slow drift on the macro.
beats.transition: Hard cut into the macro; hold.
beats.sfx: Music drops to a beat of near-silence on 'reality.'

beats.vo: Comment DROP and I'll send you the full Glow Recipe workflow.
beats.super: 'DROP' huge, quote-marked, slams in on the mouth macro; 'full workflow' resolves under it.
beats.visual: Extreme mouth and lower-face macro saying 'DROP,' then pull to the creator with the Glow Recipe plus Masonry end tag.
beats.masonry: Close on a hero Masonry generation of the creator with the product, then the Glow Recipe plus Masonry end card. The whole reel: zero actors, zero shoot.
beats.edit: Big macro punch on 'DROP,' then pull back to the end card.
beats.transition: Hard slam-cut on 'DROP'; settle to the end card.
beats.sfx: Bass slam on 'DROP'; track resolves with a button-up.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 19-21: 'DROP / full / your' CTA close.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Glow Recipe products (Plum Plump Hyaluronic, Watermelon Dew Drops) into the Masonry product library and set the candy-pink brand kit. (2) Generate the creator once, then run the seven workflow steps as Masonry features (face realism, product in hand, Restyle for outfit, environment swap, emotion control, motion pass, imperfection layer); keep the creator locked with seed-lock across every step. (3) Edit per beat following the Super style, Edit / Motion, Transition and SFX direction; this one has talking-creator VO plus keyword supers. Glow Recipe is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
refsummary: The original (Tim Koda) is a UGC-workflow reel: a creator talks to camera while on-screen steps add the face, the product in hand, an outfit change, environment change, emotion and movement, with the twist that the creator herself is AI. Watch it for the step-by-step UGC build; our version maps each step to a Masonry feature.
story: Same seven-step UGC workflow, reframed to Masonry with Glow Recipe as the demo brand. Arc: HOOK, the creator talking to you is not real, she is generated in Masonry. THE STEPS, face realism, product in hand, outfit change, every environment, emotion control, natural movement, and the small imperfections that make it indistinguishable from reality. CLOSE, zero actors, zero shoot, unlimited on-brand UGC, comment DROP. The viewer should believe they cannot tell this UGC creator is generated.
takeaway: Masonry can generate an entire UGC testimonial, creator included, that is indistinguishable from a real person, with zero actors and zero shoots.
